channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: yung13yubabie/line-summary
item.description: 在 Windows 上用 Claude Code 讀本機 LINE 電腦版聊天記錄、產生每日摘要的 MCP server（wxSQLite3/aes128cbc 解密） — ⭐18, Python

item.title: whoisqwerz/pocket_disasm
item.description: Multi-session IDALib MCP router for coding agents. Analyze multiple binaries in parallel with IDA-compatible reverse engineering tools. — ⭐13, Python

item.title: wassermanproductions/unofficial-davinci-mcp
item.description: Let any AI agent run DaVinci Resolve — MCP server with live Studio control, free-edition FCPXML/LUT workflows, reference color matching, beat-aware music cuts, dialogue tightening, broadcast-loudness — ⭐13, Python

item.title: bkspace/starlight-mcp
item.description: MCP server for your Astro/Starlight docs — search_docs, get_doc, list_docs over stateless streamable HTTP. Astro integration + pure handler + Cloudflare glue. — ⭐7, TypeScript

item.title: ozankasikci/global-agent-memory
item.description: Local-first, project-aware memory MCP server for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI agents, with Obsidian and an owner dashboard. — ⭐6, Python

item.title: amirdaraee/luxembourg-mcp
item.description: Keyless MCP access to official Luxembourg public data — 21 tools over 15 public systems, zero dependencies — ⭐5, Python

item.title: viRomulus-gif/browser-integration-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Claude Desktop - an isolated browser agent (Chrome/Edge/Vivaldi via CDP). Windows. — ⭐5, Inno Setup

item.title: LuiggiVal08/toon-memory
item.description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents using TOON format (40% fewer tokens than JSON) — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: abdugafforov-bobur/hackerone-mcp
item.description: MCP server connecting Claude to the HackerOne Hacker API — programs, scope, reports, hacktivity, payouts — ⭐3, Python

item.title: vibheksoni/session-export
item.description: Convert AI coding CLI sessions between Codex, Claude Code, Pi, and OpenCode, with SDK, CLI, and MCP chat history search. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: luke-fairbanks/broll
item.description: The content studio MCP for coding agents — BYO-key generation, deterministic video/carousel rendering, draft-first social publishing. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: clementrx/Performance-agent
item.description: Open-source AI Strength & Conditioning coach for your terminal. Runs in Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Codex — the LLM narrates, a deterministic engine calculates, and it won't lie about unrealistic goals — ⭐3, Python

item.title: AlloySecureGroup/CanaryConsoleMCP
item.description: MCP server for the Thinkst Canary Console API -- manage Birds, Canarytokens, and incidents from any MCP-compatible client. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: AndyShaman/telegram-business-bridge
item.description: Connect any AI agent to your personal Telegram via the official Business API — no userbot, no ban risk, no Premium. Agent reads & searches full history, drafts replies; every reply waits for your ✅. M — ⭐3, Python

item.title: shrishailrana-maker/svn-agent-mcp-v1
item.description: Strict SVN MCP server for agent-safe SVN workflows — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: korovin-aa97/talkthrough-mcp
item.description: MCP server: turn narrated screen recordings into agent-ready data — local Whisper transcript, scene keyframes, OCR, wall-clock anchoring. Record your screen, talk — your AI agent files the bugs. — ⭐8, Python

item.title: Slyke/mcp-technitium-dns
item.description: Safety-focused MCP server for querying and managing Technitium DNS Server through the Technitium HTTP API. — ⭐8, JavaScript

item.title: multiagentnews/.github
item.description: New agent tools, agent frameworks, orchestration patterns, LLM releases, MCP servers, agent infrastructures, and more. — ⭐6, HTML

item.title: rishabhdavesar/appstore-screenshot-generator-mcp
item.description: MCP server: wrap app screenshots in an iPhone 16 Pro frame with marketing text for App Store previews — ⭐5, Python

item.title: 0x2fycy3/inquisitor
item.description: Optimal-path problem solving for AI agents — triage, prune, investigate. MCP server + agent skill combining Newton's Analysis-Synthesis method, NASA P10 rules, and heuristic-search pruning so agents n — ⭐3, Python

item.title: alchaincyf/doubao-search-mcp
item.description: 豆包搜索 MCP server — 给换了国产模型的 Claude Code 补上联网能力。字节系信源、千字正文、每月500次免费 | Agent-first web search MCP — ⭐16, JavaScript

item.title: xyonium/futu-opend-mcp
item.description: MCP server exposing Futu OpenD read-only investment-research quote APIs — ⭐9, Python

item.title: skandavivek/openagent
item.description: Restaurant-booking agent demo: FastAPI + Claude tool-use loop + real MCP server + eval-driven-dev harness — ⭐6, Python

item.title: italoo97/study-mcp
item.description: MCP server to ingest and search study materials using semantic search — ⭐4, Python

item.title: djtelicloud/grok-mcp-server
item.description: Local-first Grok MCP server & gateway. One shared Grok agent for Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code, Codex & Desktop. xAI API + CLI planes, Control Center. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: tiny-agent-company/imessage-agent-template
item.description: Text a number, an AI agent shops and pays. Template for building iMessage agents on Agentcard: Photon (spectrum-ts) transport, SMS-OTP phone sign-in, and a Claude tool-use loop over the Agentcard MCP — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: medullaflow/ribosome
item.description: Reference resolver for the ribosome standard: mise + MCP registry adapters, phased materialization into one reproducible lockfile. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: ComputingVictor/MCP-CENDOJ
item.description: MCP server para el CENDOJ 🇪🇸 — Acceso automatizado a resoluciones judiciales de España, filtros avanzados de jurisprudencia y lectura de sentencias mediante Model Context Protocol y API REST — ⭐3, Python

item.title: tangosdev/tangOS
item.description: tangOS - unified toolkit for decompilation projects. Desktop Console (MCP server + live viewer); source + Windows/macOS releases. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: Ghosts-Protocol-Pvt-Ltd/wyrm-mcp
item.description: Persistent memory for AI agents, over MCP. Local-first, negative learning, hybrid recall. Docs and community home (source is maintained privately). — ⭐3, n/a
